summary: P2 Real-time Collaboration Expansion testing complete. WebSocket global channel working: auth flow, ping/pong keepalive, invalid token rejection (4001). Frontend NotificationBell uses WS subscribe. Dashboard, NotaryDashboard, AdminDashboard subscribe to request_assigned, request_completed, notary_queue_update events for auto-refresh. All notification APIs working. Backend broadcasts events on request create/assign/complete.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (10/min) causes test skips when running many sequential tests - expected behavior but affects testing

critical_code_review_comments: Good: ws_manager.py has clean separation between transaction rooms and global user channels
Good: Global channels support multiple tabs per user (_global_connections is Dict[user_id, Set[WebSocket]])
Good: ws_routes.py handles auth flow correctly - requires auth message first, closes with 4001 on invalid token
Good: notification_service.py uses ws_manager.push_to_user to broadcast notifications via WS
Good: broadcast_event function supports targeted (list of user_ids) or global broadcast
Good: notary_routes.py broadcasts notary_queue_update on create, request_assigned on assign, request_completed on complete
Good: useGlobalWebSocket.js implements auto-reconnect (3s delay), ping/pong (25s interval), event subscription pattern
Good: WebSocketContext.jsx wraps entire app in App.js for global access via useWS hook
Good: NotificationBell.jsx subscribes to 'notification' event, has 60s polling fallback
Good: Dashboard.jsx subscribes to 'request_assigned' and 'request_completed' for auto-refresh
Good: NotaryDashboard.jsx subscribes to all 3 event types for real-time queue updates
Good: AdminDashboard.jsx subscribes to all platform events for admin monitoring

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 core tests passed, 4 skipped due to rate limiting)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard loads, NotificationBell works, WS connects successfully)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 Real-time Collaboration tested and working. WebSocket endpoint at /api/ws/global requires JWT auth as first message: {type:'auth', token:JWT}. Returns {type:'connected', user_id, online_count}. Ping/pong keepalive with {type:'ping'}/{type:'pong'}. Invalid tokens get 4001 close code. Events broadcast as {type:'event', event:'<name>', data:{}, timestamp}. Notifications as {type:'notification', notification:{}}. Frontend useWS hook provides subscribe() for event listening. Dashboard components auto-refresh on WebSocket events. Rate limiting on /api/auth/login is 10/min - may need to adjust for intensive testing.

websocket_auth.POST auth message with valid JWT: WORKING - returns connected response with user_id

websocket_keepalive.ping/pong: WORKING - sends pong response to ping messages

frontend_integration.WebSocketProvider: WORKING - wraps entire app in App.js
frontend_integration.NotificationBell: WORKING - uses useWS subscribe for real-time notifications
frontend_integration.NotaryDashboard auto-refresh: WORKING - subscribes to notary_queue_update, request_assigned, request_completed
frontend_integration.AdminDashboard auto-refresh: WORKING - subscribes to all 3 event types

broadcast_events.notary_queue_update: Triggered on new notarization request creation
broadcast_events.request_assigned: Triggered when notary assigns to request
